raw_input:
[5.0/5] Wife really loves it Facial Steamer Nano Hot Steam Face Spa
Device Ionic Face Steaming Machine for
Home Facials Personal Moisturizing
Humidifier Vaporizer for Skincare Beauty

My wife has always wanted a facial steamer but didn’t want to spend too much money. So,
when I saw this one, I thought it was a good deal. So far, she really likes it. She says that the
water heats up quickly and the steam coming out is smooth and doesn’t spit out any water. The
little cool mist steamer will come in handy on hot days, which will be coming up soon here in
California. Even though this comes with some acne removing tools, my wife has not used those
so cannot comment on whether they are effective or not. The steamer and mister, however, has
been something she really loves. Five stars [4.0/5] Small Unit, Good Results This is a small facial steamer that has had good results for my daughter. She has another unit that must be 3X bigger than this unit. This unit is approx 5.25" x 3.5" x 6.5" tall. This is a compact unit. We were first concerned that this would even work but after a few uses she is very happy with the operation of this unit. The unit includes the main compact unit, a small hand held unit, a mask, and 4 tools. I took 1 star away because of the price. She is happy with the results. [5.0/5] Quick and powerful It took a while to get this review together because there was a lot to unpack with this steamer and all the little extras that came with it; however, what stood out most was how fast and powerful the steamer itself was.
If you were thinking you'd be waiting around a few minutes for this thing to start producing steam, chances are you will be pleasantly surprised by how little time it takes for the device to start pushing out huge clouds of steam.

While the instructions that come with this set are detailed, using the device itself is fairly straightforward.
Simply be aware that the steamer needs to be plugged in to work; moreover, you will probably want to sit during its operation so that you can lean over it for a few minutes at a time.
That means you'll want to find a place where you can use the steamer comfortably, like a vanity or desk.

Other things to keep in mind as you consider buying this.
- The handheld, portable, rechargeable device is a mister, not a steamer. This wasn't completely clear on the product page, so I want to make note of it. Basically, the mister is a nice thing you can use to cool down and refresh your skin on the go.
- Packaging suggests two different types of water for the steamer and mister respectively.
- steamer = distilled water
- mister = mineral water
- The steamer's cord is about 2.5 feet long, which is something you will want to consider when decided where you will be most likely to use the steamer.
- The little extras like the headband with ears and the pore clearing tools make this a great gift to give someone who enjoys getting and giving facials.
- The manufacturer warns that acne which is hormonal in nature will not respond to the steamer
- The instructions also advise you not to use the steamer everyday, nor more than 10 minutes at a time. Accordingly, this is not something that is likely to add a lot of time to your daily routine, but rather something you will use once or twice a week.
- The steamer itself is cute and compact, so you're not giving up a huge amount of space if you get one, nor do you necessarily have to hide it in between uses, unless you want to.
- The steam produced is hot/warm and there is no way to control the temperature; however, you can easily regulate how you experience the heat simply by adjusting the proximity of your face to the steamer.

Overall, I would definitely recommend this facial steamer set as a purchase for yourself or as a gift for someone else who enjoys giving/getting spa treatments at home.
I personally like the effect it had on my skin; I felt as though using it has helped with both the cleansing and hydration of my skin.
Once you get through all the instructions, procure the right type of water for your steamer, and identify where you want to set it up, you will be rewarded with an easy to use machine that produces copious amounts of steam very rapidly [4.0/5] Obsessed I absolutely love this little facial steamer. It's a great size, and heats up the water very quickly. I also like the tools that this comes with. I feel like the headband is a touch too small for my head, but it is very cute. After using it, my skin felt hydrated, and it really opened up my pores. The reason I'm giving it 4 stars is because I wish the cord was a bit longer and thinner. I have to use an extension cord to use it at my makeup desk. [5.0/5] Makes the skin hydrated as well as Soothes the sinuses [[VIDEOID:3ea33c1e85d8d1a8ce0fd7987edd95af]] This facial steamer heats up very fast (in 30 seconds as stated in the manual) and is very easy to use. You just add some distilled water or purified water and turn the steamer on. Since the steam is hot, you need to make sure that your face is away enough from the nozzle. I like how the steam comes from in a direction that covers the chin and the face. There is no option for adjusting the level of the mist but I do not think if it is necessary since the amount of steam is good in this device. There is a manual inside the package that I found really helpful. The water tank is small and for me, the tank size is holding the exact amount of water I need for each usage.

The steamer can be used for hydrating the skin. It also opens the pores and is good for deep cleaning. But the thing I really enjoy while using this steamer is that it is very helpful for my Sinusitis. The warm mist soothes and moisturizes my sinus passageway. So, for me, it does not only make my skin hydrated but also unblocking my sinuses.

I also like the portable facial steamer. It is chargeable which is great. It is not that much powerful and it is releasing cold mist but, it is a good size for travel. Surprisingly, this tiny humidifier works for about 10-15 minutes. The other things in the package are also useful to have a nice Spa at home.

All in all, I like the whole set and to me, each part of this package is useful and works great. [5.0/5] Nice facial steaming product, with handy portable misting device. Decent performance. At a spa, people go into the steamroom to relax muscles, open pores and detoxify. This device isn't a steamroom but aims at providing some of the same benefits to the face and neck, especially regarding the skin and pores. This device heats water up to 104F, creating steam which is expelled from the golden rim outlet. Unfortunately it cannot handle the addition of essential oils, recommending only pure water (or weak alkaline mineral water). This would have been a fantastic ability and function. Oh well. As a pure water streaming device, it is a decent performer.
It does not take long for the water to heat, about 30 seconds, and a fine steam mist is pushed out from the device. The optimum range is 6 - 10 inches away from the steam port. It's a good idea to start at a 12 inch distance, and ease your face closer, gauging your skins tolerance.
(Note: you can add toner that can fully dissolve into the water. The key is not to have a viscous liquid, or particulates, which will adversely affect the atomization.)
We found operation to be fairly simple and easy. Fill the water reservoir, put reservoir back into it's position. turn on the unit, within 30 seconds face gets a spa steam experience.
Is this as effective as those face steamers that have a cone that keeps the steam contained? No, because the steam floats freely. But, it's also multiples cheaper than those kinds of facial steaming devices. This is a credible portable device, that is compact enough that it won't take up much counter space. It's minimalist design will allow it to fit in with most decor.
It's easy to set up and operate. It's acceptably effective.
Also included with this steaming device is a mini misting device, a headband (with pink ears) and 4 skin care tools (intended to help treat acne and blackheads).
The mini misting device does not heat the water you put in it. Rather, via a rechargeable battery, a touch of the button will spray a fine mist. This is very handy in the summer, when you might want a spritz of water to help cool you when outside. It's an apt complement to the facial steaming device.
I found the facial steaming device to be capable of decent performance. If you have realistic expectations, you'll enjoy this product. And, I like the rechargeable portable misting device.
Overall, a worthwhile product set, which earns a 4.5 - 4.75 star rating, with a high level recommendation. [4.0/5] Works Well I love using a facial steamer on my pamper routine days. The one I was using broke and I needed a new one. This one is compact and does what I need. At first I thought it was going to be too small, but it works just a well as my larger one did. It is easy to use and easy to set up. [5.0/5] I love it! Awesome product! Great for hydration and opening pores. Gets face ready for serums and moisturizer. Love it! [5.0/5] Worth It! Great product. Great quality. Exactly what I was seeking! [5.0/5] Small but powerful The steamer is easy to use. It warms up the water quickly and it is powerful in delivery the steam. I do wish that there was a way to adjust the nozzle but overall very happy with the product. I really like that it is small and it also included a mini humidifier as a bonus. [5.0/5] Worth it So I purchased this for myself, and I would recommend it. It has help me in many ways well worth it [5.0/5] Great way to end the day. My wife has been using this at night as part of her routine.
It is small and convenient to use.
it heats up really quick.
She uses it for about 30 seconds before applying masks. it helps opens up her facial pores and allow the mask to lift out more dirt/blackheads.
She really loves the additional benefits of this steamer. [4.0/5] Works Well I love using a facial steamer on my pamper routine days. The one I was using broke and I needed a new one. This one is compact and does what I need. At first I thought it was going to be too small, but it works just a well as my larger one did. It is easy to use and easy to set up. [4.0/5] Works Well I love using a facial steamer on my pamper routine days. The one I was using broke and I needed a new one. This one is compact and does what I need. At first I thought it was going to be too small, but it works just a well as my larger one did. It is easy to use and easy to set up. [1.0/5] Where is the steam? I tried it twice. No steam [[VIDEOID:2c022d12bdd375aa67df001837c0eeed]] I tried it twice. No steam. When I put the water in the little tank it emptied so fast it was ridiculous. Then I can clearly hear the machine boiling the water but no steam was coming out. I'm so disappointed. I tried the mini steamer that came with and that was just ok. Nothing to get excited about. [5.0/5] Perfecto!!! Facil de usar, super recomendable. Me encanto [5.0/5] Use with purified water Easy to use [3.0/5] Got stabbed while opening packaging all around horrible buyer be ware [[VIDEOID:82ef1e242d2546ac294ef0c9390a6408]] Packaging was a nightmare got stabbed twice . Each box was damaged or not properly put together crushed packaging Amazon box was 👍 great value u great quality just not thrilled i was stabbed buy the bonus tool kit , also head band was not included in my package please see pics and video . Great product just beware of the packaging and look for any holes before handling the box inside the Amazon box !don't get stabbed like I did ! No need for xtra tools and wishing I had the head band ! [4.0/5] Good product Good item for the cost would recommend

response:
Most buyers love steamer. Heat up fast, about 30 seconds. Steam smooth, no water spitting. Skin feel hydrated, pores open. Good for skincare routine before masks, serums, moisturizer. One buyer say help with sinusitis too.

Steamer small and compact. Not take much counter space. Cord short, about 2.5 feet. Some need extension cord. No temperature control but can adjust by moving face closer or farther, 6-10 inches good range. Use distilled water in steamer. Not for everyday use, max 10 minutes at time.

Package include mini portable mister, headband with ears, 4 skin tools for acne and blackheads. Mini mister use cold mist, not steam. Good for travel and hot days. Use mineral water in mister. Headband cute but some say too small.

No essential oils in steamer. Hormonal acne not respond to steam. Instructions detailed and helpful.

Bad reviews: one buyer get no steam at all, water drain fast, very disappointed. Another buyer get stabbed by sharp packaging tools, box damaged, headband missing from package.

Overall most buyers happy. Good value for price. Recommend as gift or personal use.
